data.methodology: WARM (incremental) single-page rebuild, NOT a cold build. For each site size: generate a synthetic multi-section markdown site, run one cold build(incremental=False) to warm caches, then time N warm rebuilds, each = edit one leaf page + Site.prepare_for_rebuild() + build(incremental=True, changed_sources={that page}) + restore the file (matches the dev-server BuildTrigger path). In-process Site.build, BuildProfile.WRITER, quiet. We report warm single-page rebuild cost (first / mean / median / min) per size. RECORD-ONLY: this baseline is a directional record captured on the maintainer's dev machine, not a CI gate.
